title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama. Chat, generate, embed, pull and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama. Works in Node, Bun, Deno and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package enabling Ollama models as LLM, chat and embeddings backends.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI). ChatGPT-like interface, model manager, RAG, multi-user.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama. Generate, chat, pull models and list local tags from JVM applications.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama. Simple idiomatic interface to generate and chat with local models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced CLI wrapper around Ollama with prompt templates, conversation history and shell shortcuts.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-like inline code assistant.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset—use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C# / .NET client for Ollama with async streaming and dependency injection helpers.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image source and compose examples for running Ollama server plus web UIs in containers.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node-selector and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain to chat with local PDFs or text files.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings any Ollama model into a server with slash commands and threads.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Slack bot using Socket-mode to answer questions with Ollama models in channels or DMs.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for Ollama’s HTTP API.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Unofficial Dart/Flutter package to integrate Ollama models into mobile or desktop apps.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package distributing the JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama.

title: ollama PyPI
summary: Official Python package on PyPI providing the ollama module used by thousands of downstream projects.
